name: Ratatater!
description: Ratatater! behaves like a pocket SMG, trading some of a pistol's usual precision for heavier sustained damage. Its Vladof barrel boosts fire rate and magazine size while reducing recoil, but the accuracy loss keeps it strongest at close to medium range. Lean into longer bursts and raw pressure rather than trying to use it like a careful marksman's sidearm.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources. It only appears at green rarity or higher.
